_comment: tower config example. Copy where you like and pass to session_watch.py via --config, or just set env vars (TOWER_WINDOW_PREFIX, TOWER_QUEUE_FILE, TOWER_HOME). Explicit CLI flags always win over this file.
_window_prefix: tmux window-name prefix identifying the agent sessions to watch. Default GJC- (gjc). Set to your own agent's window prefix.
_busy_mark: Substring that marks a BUSY pane. Default is gjc's running-spinner hint. Change to match your TUI agent.
_idle_mark: Substring that marks an IDLE (awaiting-input) pane. Default is gjc's input prompt.
_exclude: Sessions never watched — put the control-tower session's own name here so it does not watch itself.
_confirm: Consecutive equal verdicts required to commit a state (anti-flap).
_queue_file: Where the operator decision queue lives. Informational here; the queue is selected at runtime by $TOWER_QUEUE_FILE > $TOWER_HOME/queue.json > ~/.gjc/tower/queue.json.
